value.found_quote: Evaluations (often called **evals**) test model outputs to ensure they meet style and content criteria that you specify. ... we will focus on **configuring evals programmatically using the [Evals API](https://developers.openai.com/api/docs/api-reference/evals)**.
value.rationale: The page is OpenAI's own developer documentation describing the Evals offering, including the Evals API and dashboard. However, it explicitly states that OpenAI is deprecating the Evals platform, that it will become read-only on October 31, 2026, and is scheduled to shut down on November 30, 2026. Since it still works during the transition window, the lifecycle status is best described as deprecated (heading toward sunset).
